description: Create a Stop Signal Task (SST) in PsychoPy Builder where participants respond to a 'Go' arrow but withhold responses if a 'Stop' beep plays. Generate a conditions file at /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/sst_task/sst_conditions.csv containing at least 12 rows with columns: 'direction' (left/right), 'corrAns' (left/right), 'stop_signal' (1 for stop, 0 for go; ~25% stop trials), and 'ssd' (Stop Signal Delay in seconds). Save the experiment to /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/sst_task/stop_signal.psyexp. The experiment must feature an instructions routine and a trial routine consisting of a 0.5s fixation, an arrow stimulus (direction-dependent), a keyboard response (left/right), and a sound component using ~/assets/beep.wav. The sound must trigger based on the 'ssd' value and only play during trials where 'stop_signal' is 1. Implement a random loop using the conditions file.
